---
name: Bug or broken link
about: Something in the template is broken, missing, or wrong
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What's wrong?

One sentence.

## Where?

File path, folder, or section of the README/USAGE docs.

## Expected vs. actual

What should it look like vs. what it looks like now.

## PR-ready fix?

- [ ] I can submit a PR for this
- [ ] I need someone else to fix it
